infeasible_scenarios.reasoning: The skill's core workflow requires authenticated GitHub API access (gh CLI), a real git repository with a PR branch, and interactive user confirmation via a chat interface. The eval sandbox has no GitHub authentication, no real repositories, and no interactive user session. All 5 feasible scenarios work around this by testing the artifacts the agent produces (scripts, plans, code, documents) rather than executing the workflow live.

The skill’s PR title guidance (imperative, scoped) is best checked on the hosting UI; the file-based eval only receives pr-body.md, not the title field, so an end-to-end title rubric is not gradable from artifacts alone.
Scenarios cannot include back-and-forth with reviewers or product; tasks must be one-shot with no interactive clarification.
